# Mini Dream Time

> Mini Dream Time is a calm read-aloud bedtime story library for parents and children. It offers age-friendly illustrated stories, parent-paced page turns, and gentle story collections designed for bedtime routines.

Primary domain: https://minidreamtime.com

## Core pages

- Home: https://minidreamtime.com/
- Bedtime stories for kids: https://minidreamtime.com/bedtime-stories-for-kids
- Read-aloud bedtime stories: https://minidreamtime.com/read-aloud-bedtime-stories
- Calm bedtime stories: https://minidreamtime.com/calm-bedtime-stories
- Stories for ages 1-3: https://minidreamtime.com/stories/1-3-years
- Stories for ages 3-5: https://minidreamtime.com/stories/3-5-years
- Stories for ages 5-7: https://minidreamtime.com/stories/5-7-years
- Pricing: https://minidreamtime.com/pricing.md

## Product summary

Mini Dream Time helps parents choose a calm, age-appropriate illustrated story quickly and read it aloud one page at a time. The product is not a video app, game, or AI chatbot for children. It is designed around a shared bedtime ritual: parent chooses, parent reads, child listens and looks at gentle artwork.

## Story collection

Mini Dream Time includes original recurring characters and story seeds grouped by age range, mood, category, and character set.

## Important positioning

- Category: read-aloud bedtime story library / illustrated bedtime stories for kids.
- Primary audience: parents and caregivers.
- Child age bands: 1-3 yrs, 2-4 yrs, 3-5 yrs, 4-6 yrs, 5-7 yrs.
- Bedtime principle: calm beginning, gentle middle, predictable resolution.
- Story text stays as app text, separate from artwork.
